# Flav: The Short-Form Video App for Food Lovers

## Overview
Flav is a mobile application for iOS and Android that combines TikTok-style short-form video discovery with structured cooking utility. It allows users to watch food videos, get step-by-step cooking guidance with built-in timers, and enables creators to monetize their recipes directly.

## Core Features

### For Home Cooks
- **Visual Discovery**: Swipeable feed of high-quality recipe videos.
- **Cooking Mode**: Step-by-step interactive interface with integrated timers and ingredient checklists.
- **AI Sous-Chef**: "Flav AI" is an integrated assistant that answers cooking questions, suggests substitutions, and provides tips in real-time.
- **Import Recipes**: Tools to import and structure recipes from Instagram, TikTok, and other web sources.

### For Creators (Chef's Table)
- **Direct Monetization**: Earn from tips and premium "locked" recipes.
- **AI Recipe Generation**: Convert video content into structured recipe data automatically.
- **Analytics**: "Flav Ads Manager" provides detailed insights into audience engagement and earnings.

## Technical Details
- **Platforms**: iOS, Android
- **Web Portal**: Advertiser and Creator dashboard available at flav.app/ads
- **Pricing**: Free to download. Optional "Flav Pro" subscription for power users.

## Brand Partnerships
Advertisers can use the Flav Ads Manager to run targeted campaigns based on dietary preferences (e.g., Vegan, Keto) and flavor profiles.

## Links
- Website: https://flav.app
- Advertiser Login: https://flav.app/ads/login
- Download: https://flav.app/download
